query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN url LIKE '%cloudfront%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cdn_hosted,
  SUM(CASE WHEN url LIKE '%muscache%' OR url LIKE '%airbnb%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as airbnb_urls,
  SUM(CASE WHEN url NOT LIKE '%cloudfront%' AND url NOT LIKE '%muscache%' AND url NOT LIKE '%airbnb%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as other_urls
FROM property_photos;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user wPFtpuzcjTMQHQ6.root --database bn23yPpAqDW8FGGWUFqWsM --execute 
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN url LIKE '%cloudfront%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cdn_hosted,
  SUM(CASE WHEN url LIKE '%muscache%' OR url LIKE '%airbnb%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as airbnb_urls,
  SUM(CASE WHEN url NOT LIKE '%cloudfront%' AND url NOT LIKE '%muscache%' AND url NOT LIKE '%airbnb%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as other_urls
FROM property_photos;
